options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -accuracy_level
options.description: set accuracy level for delay calculation

options.name: -advanced_accuracy_mode
options.description: {medium|high|ultra} advanced accuracy level

options.name: -advanced_calculation_mode
options.description: {medium|high} Enable advanced calculation mode for base delay.

options.name: -advanced_node_pin_cap_settings
options.description: {true|false} Enable advanced node pin cap settings.

options.name: -advanced_pincap_mode
options.description: Enable advanced receiver pin cap mode for base delay.

options.name: -combine_mmmc
options.description: {none|early_late|early_late_corner} Specifies whether delay calculation runs are to be combined for delay calculation simulations

options.name: -early_irdrop_data_type
options.description: {best_average|worst|best|average|worst_average} IRDrop EIV DB EivMethod for early corner

options.name: -enable_corner_based_beol
options.description: Enable Anchor corner based BEOL analysis

options.name: -enable_high_fanout
options.description: Enables the default net delay which will be annotated on high fanout nets

options.name: -enable_input_slew_sensitivity_on_constraint
options.description: {true|false} Enable input slew ensitivity on constraint

options.name: -enable_quiet_receivers_for_hold
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -equivalent_waveform_model
options.description: {none|no_propagation|propagation} Controls the equivalent waveform model to be used

options.name: -equivalent_waveform_model_for_timing_check
options.description: {true|false} Enable EWM for timing check delay.

options.name: -ewm_type
options.description: Equivalent waveform model type to be used

options.name: -honorSlewPropConstraint
options.description: Determines whether to propagate the slew from the disabled timing arcs to the output pin.

options.name: -ignoreNetLoad
options.description: Uses zero-cap, zero-resistance wire-load model for estimating delays.

options.name: -irdrop_data_type
options.description: {best_average|worst|best|average|worst_average} IRDrop EIV DB EivMethod

options.name: -irDrop_window_based
options.description: {none|late|early|both} Fetch window based EIV values from EIV DB

options.name: -late_irdrop_data_type
options.description: {best_average|worst|best|average|worst_average} IRDrop EIV DB EivMethod for late corner

options.name: -library_interpolation_mode
options.description: {linear|non_linear|non_linear_advanced} library scaling mode for interpolation flow

options.name: -nonlinear_voltage_scaling_improvements
options.description: {true|false} Enables non-linear voltage scaling improvements

options.name: -ptr_effort
options.description: PTR analysis effort. Should be between 0 and 1: 0 - lowest accuracy and runtime, 1 - highest accuracy and runtime

options.name: -reportOutBound
options.description: Generates a report that contains a list of index values (input transition) in the delay tables that are beyond the index range.

options.name: -save_set_inst_voltage_cmd
options.description: Enable set_inst_voltage cmd saving in persistant db

options.name: -SIAware
options.description: Enables SIAware delay calculation that also includes cross-talk induced delays.

options.name: -signoff_alignment_settings
options.description: {true|false} Turn on/off signoff alignment settings

options.name: -skip_slew_merge_from_disabled_path
options.description: {true|false} Enable slew merge from disable path

options.name: -slewOutBoundLimitHigh
options.description: Limits the maximum slew used in the analysis to the specified value.

options.name: -slewOutBoundLimitLow
options.description: Limits the minimum slew used in the analysis to the specified value.

options.name: -socv_accuracy_mode
options.description: {low|medium|high|ultra} level-based-accuracy-effort in AAE for delays and slews

options.name: -socv_lvf_mode
options.description: Controls interpretation of LVF data.

options.name: -socv_machine_learning_level
options.description: Enable socv machine learning mode

options.name: -socv_use_lvf_tables
options.description: {all|delay|slew|constraint} Controls which type of variations are considered during analysis.

options.name: -use_top_interface_delay_in_context
options.description: {true|false} Enables use of output stage delays from top analysis in block context analysis

options.name: -view_specific_settings
options.description: <view:setting:value> Spicifies a global variable value or macro settings for particle view using {viewName:eng_global|macro:value}

options.name: -voltage_scaling_compatibility_mode
options.description: {true|false} Enables voltage scaling compatibility mode

options.name: -wire_variation_correlation_mode
options.description: {statistical|binomial} Specify wire variatio inter layer correlation

options.name: -wire_variation_rc_correlation
options.description: Same layer RC correlation for wire variation
